title: teucrium montanum var. supinum
intro: Teucrium montanum var. supinum, also known as alpine germander, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, alpine germander has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat bacterial infections. The health benefits of alpine germander include its ability to support liver function, improve cognitive function, and act as an antioxidant, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Alpine germander can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
